message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 185 — terminal-action audit cx-threaded

RusticMaple: record_workflow_terminal_action_with_cx + _maybe_cx
dispatcher added. 14 call sites migrated in run_workflow_inner.
Every workflow exit path (success/error/abort/approval/denied)
now threads cx into terminal audit + undo writes when cx is Some.
Strangler-fig functionally complete for the runner's lifecycle
surface; remaining work is Step-trait refactor + cross-crate
legacy-caller migration. 31/31 runner tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
